verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Well, I went to the enemy's camp and I, Took back what he stole from me, I Took back what he stole from me, I Took back what he stole from me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Well, I went to the enemy's camp and I, Took back what he stole from me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He's under my feet, He's under my feet, He's under my feet, He's under my feet, He's under my feet, He's under my feet, Satan is under my feet.
